## Pull Request

### Summary

What does this PR change and why?

### Related issues

Closes #NNN

### User problem

What user problem does this solve?

### Proposed behavior

What does the code do now that it didn't before?

### Data / schema effects

- [ ] No data changes
- [ ] Migration included
- [ ] Schema updated in `data/posts.schema.json`

### Tests

- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] All existing tests pass
- [ ] Classification test cases covered (see AGENTS.md checklist)

### Media analysis honesty

- [ ] I did not claim full media analysis without actual media acquisition
- [ ] Completeness flags are set honestly

### Deployment / migration steps

What needs to happen to deploy this?

### Risks

What could go wrong?

### Before / after examples

Show a concrete example of the behavior change.

### Agent context (if AI-authored)

- **Agent:** name (model)
- **Session:** timestamp
